title: Remove types of unused record components from pattern matching
description: This rule ensures that types of unused record components are removed from pattern matching in Java. Keeping unnecessary types in pattern matching can clutter code and reduce readability. Removing them helps maintain clean and understandable code, making maintenance easier and reducing confusion for developers.
recommendation: Review pattern matching statements and remove types of record components that are not used in the code block.

checks.message: Review pattern matching statements and remove types of record components that are not used in the code block.
